'''Tonder''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Algaran system]]. It was a tectonically, seismically active world with incredible mining potential. It boasted one [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. The [[Algarian Bureau of Planetary Colonization]] and [[Bureau of Volcanoes]] disputed which bureau had jurisdiction over the planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
